resources.string: Statistical estimates from historical data. Not a guarantee of future outcomes.

All probabilities, confidence scores, and accuracy metrics shown in this application are derived solely from historical game data using statistical and machine-learning models. Random games are by definition unpredictable; this app does not claim to predict outcomes with certainty and does not guarantee any result. Use the analytics for educational and informational purposes only.
Add a round or import a CSV/JSON to start training the models.
